channel.title: Crowd Control
channel.description: Latest releases from Crowd Control on Dropout.tv

item.title: Have You Been Bad?
item.description:
Moshe, Ify, and Leslie do some early morning crowd work with a very horny audience.

Duration: 32:40

Tags: Crowd Control, jacquis neal, stand up comedy, crowd work, unscripted, competitions, storytelling, cool jobs, alternative lifestyles, red flags, moshe kasher, ify nwadiwe, leslie lao

item.title: Writing "Partners"
item.description:
Baron, Tina, and Kiran show off their theater training and process a lot of childhood trauma.

Duration: 34:25

Tags: Crowd Control, jacquis neal, stand up comedy, crowd work, unscripted, competitions, storytelling, cool jobs, alternative lifestyles, red flags, baron vaughn, tina friml, kiran deol
